personal.name: Farel
personal.headline: Continiously Learner.
personal.subHeadline: Unram Electrical Engineering '25 | Software Engineering alum. Currently a student of the craft, learning to navigate the depths of backend architecture and the grit of a well-optimized database. Just out here solving logic puzzles, one step at a time.

projects.title: Digitalizing Pesantren Syafi'iyah Darul Muhsin NW
projects.problem: Conventional administration was slowing down everything—from tracking students and teachers to handling tuition fees and registrations.
projects.solution: Designed an integrated management platform with a relational database to centralize academic flows, new student enrollment, and financial modules.
projects.impact: Shifted the entire workflow to digital, boosting financial accuracy and creating a much faster registration experience for new students.

projects.title: TXT to VCF Telegram Automator
projects.problem: Manually converting thousands of contacts from TXT to VCF was a massive bottleneck, and distributing those files was even more time-consuming.
projects.solution: Built a Python-based automation script that parses raw data, splits them into structured VCF files, and auto-deploys them via Telegram Bot API.
projects.impact: Cut down conversion time by 95% and fully automated the distribution pipeline—no more manual file sharing.

experience.description: I’m out here leveling up my soft skills-learning how to communicate, collab, and navigate the chaos of event planning. Just a student of the game, growing one project at a time.
